title: Support Public SystemVerilog Enum Using `verilator_config
body:
I am having difficulty making an SV enum public using the `verilator_config mechanism.

The enum is defined in a package:

```
package bbus_pkg;
    typedef enum [1:0]
    {
        BBUS_CS_NIL,
        BBUS_CS_WR,
        BBUS_CS_RD,
        BBUS_CS_ERR
    }
    t_bbus_cs;
endpackage
```

What is the correct `verilator_config syntax for this?  It's not successful with

```
`verilator_config
public -module "bbus_pkg" -var "t_bbus_cs"
```

It's also not successful with

```
`verilator_config
public -module -var "t_bbus_cs"
```

What am I doing wrong?

FYI, I am able to make it public using /* verilator public */, but I prefer to go the `verilator_config route.
